nameMeanings.name: Hulton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the Scottish surname, which seems to have been originally a local name from a lost place in Ayrshire.  Robert Fulton  (  1765–1815 ) was the American engineer who designed the first commercially successful steamboat. In Britain the name is associated with the Scottish actor  Fulton McKay  (  1922–87 ).

en.lifeSummary: Hulton was born about 1175, in Little Hulton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. She married Mrs. DeWorsley. They were the parents of at least 1 son.
